subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-01-24 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The assault of one people against another, and the aggression which a person exhibits towards another, are demonstrations of natural behavior
subcodes.first_line_orig: هجوم هر ملتی بر ملت دیگر و تعدی هر نفسی بر سائر نفوس طبیعی است و این بمقتضای طبیعت
subcodes.subjects: @competition vs. cooperation; the struggle for existence, @need for an educator, @two aspects of the human soul; the higher and lower natures
